🎯

helix_hud

Minimal, information-dense heads-up display with the Ghost design language.

💬

helix_npc

Cinematic NPC interaction system with dialogue trees and quest integration.

📊

helix_economy

Real-time market dashboard with live pricing, trends, and player analytics.

🔧

helix_crafting

Visual crafting interface with recipe discovery, progress tracking, and quality tiers.

📡

helix_dispatch

Full-featured MDT with dispatch management, unit tracking, and BOLO system.

🏁

helix_missions

Visual mission editor with branching objectives, rewards, and player progress tracking.

🛠️

helix_devtools

MCP bridge with 41 tools for real-time server inspection, debugging, and administration.
